title: FITFO (Figure It The Fuck Out)
html:
Yahir's internal directive — when shit goes south, stay calm, tap the inner error-correcting voice, and figure it the fuck out. First explicitly named in 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure but the disposition recurs from 2018 onward. Operationally tied to the China chapter travel mishaps catalogued in 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — FITFO is what Yahir ran on the entire 6-month solo trip when WeChat broke, when Alipay locked out, when mei dong vanished mid-onboarding.

TL;DR

  • 21 inbound links — the densest "internal-directive" stub in the vault.
  • Origin: 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure, formalized as a name right before the China chapter.
  • Pre-dating roots: 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept / 2022 04 12 instead of osig — same disposition, no name yet.
  • The disposition that carried the China chapter (2024 08 14 travel occurrences — every mishap is a FITFO test).
  • Operationally adjacent to voluntary adversity, fear of not doing, soul as beacon, note as letter to self — the family of self-direction frames that anchor Yahir's solo-mode work.

Key themes

Calm-then-correct. The directive starts with stay-calm, not just figure-out. The emotional regulation is the precondition.

Inner error-correcting voice. soul as beacon is the named version of this voice in the vault.

Travel as proving ground. 2024 08 14 travel occurrences reads as a FITFO test catalog — Yahir explicitly identifies the moments where the disposition saved him.

Carries into business. 2025 11 04 personal training approach applies FITFO to gym-floor sales conversations. The training-floor and the airport-line use the same operating system.

Counter-frame. fear of not doing is the negative-space version — the dread that powers FITFO's necessity.

Where it shows up

  • Before/during travel — 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure, 2024 08 14 travel occurrences, china / egypt / israel / jordan / india / vietnam entries.
  • In sales / gym work — 2025 11 04 personal training approach.
  • In OSU-era pivots — 2022 04 12 instead of osig.
  • In far-back 2018 sketches — 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept.

Source summaries

  • 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure — naming
  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — proving ground
  • 2025 11 04 personal training approach — applied to sales
  • 2018 12 27 youtube for all the senses concept — pre-named instinct
  • 2022 04 12 instead of osig — pre-named instinct

Plus ~16 entity / concept / synthesis cross-links.

Connections

  • voluntary adversity · fear of not doing · soul as beacon · — internal-directive family
  • china chapter · china · egypt · israel · jordan · india · vietnam — destinations where FITFO got tested
  • viktor frankl — philosophical kin
  • voluntary adversity as philosophy · the china chapter as comparative anthropology · founder loneliness 2022 2026 (syntheses)
  • yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 — applied to AEO arc
